name: Joseph Stark
likes: Basketball (plays JV at his high school)
Sneakers, especially Nike Air Force 1s and Jordans
Anime, especially Demon Slayer and Jujutsu Kaisen

notes: Saving up for a higher-end GPU. Cares about brands and 'cool factor' but appreciates practical tech upgrades. Prefers gift cards over wrong-size clothing surprises.
